form.formComment: Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Most recently raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 14 at Flemington in the G1 Newmarket on March 7 over 1200m, 7 len behind Caballus carrying 53kg at $101. The run before that got back early 8th of 11 at this track in the LR City Marion on February 21 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Power Beau with 61kg at $6.50. Looks a strong top-three prospect this line-up.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation second of 9 at this track in the LR Xmas Hcp December 27 over 1200m, a nose behind Klabel carrying 58.5kg at $3.10. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 0.8 len this track LR Wh Wylie September 13 over 1100m defeating Fancify with 56.5kg at $3. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Terrific chance to continue the strong form.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Finished off last campaign 4th of 10 at Flemington Bm78 on April 25 over 1100m, 1.2 len behind Losesomewinmore carrying 59.5kg at $8. When resuming last campaign got back early 6th of 8 at Caulfield in the G2 Caul Sprint on October 19 2024 over 1000m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Estriella with 53kg at $8. Fitter for a jump-out on March 25 at Caulfield Heath when finished fourth. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

Solid top-three claims if anywhere near her best.

First-up tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 3rd of 7 at Randwick in the LR Fireball on March 7 over 1100m, long-neck behind Beadman carrying 59kg at $9. Key runner who is a great chance to atone.
